name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBalanceHelper.DepthFudgeStagger
summary: Supposed to increase foot friction: Impact depth of a collision with the foot is changed when staggerFall is running - impact.SetDepth(impact.GetDepth() - depthFudgeStagger).
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
